ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* Property ID from the source data */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date the listing was added */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the property is located */,
  "neighborhood" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "rent" REAL /* Monthly rent amount */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "rent_sqft" REAL /* Rent per square foot */,
  "rent_sqft_cat" INTEGER /* Category for rent per square foot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "fips_block" INTEGER /* FIPS block code for the property */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the listing was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., available, leased, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_rent_sqft_cat FOREIGN KEY ("rent_sqft_cat") REFERENCES rent_sqft_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the neighborhood is located */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rent_sqft_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the rent per square foot range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the rent per square foot range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the listing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the listing */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the listing (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the rental data was recorded */,
  "rent" REAL /* Rent amount at the time of recording */,
  "rent_sqft" REAL /* Rent per square foot at the time of recording */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property at the time of recording */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property at the time of recording */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property at the time of recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_history_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the trend was reported */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent for the region */,
  "average_rent_sqft" REAL /* Average rent per square foot for the region */,
  "average_bathrooms" REAL /* Average number of bathrooms in the region */,
  "average_sqft" REAL /* Average square footage of properties in the region */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate in the region */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the rental market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "date_predicted" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_rent" REAL /* Predicted average rent for the region */,
  "average_bathrooms" REAL /* Predicted average number of bathrooms in the region */,
  "average_sqft" REAL /* Predicted average square footage of properties in the region */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Predicted vacancy rate in the region */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_description" TEXT /* Description of the predicted market condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_team_members FOREIGN KEY ("team_members") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
